# Recorded-shape Twitch USERNOTICE lines (subs, resubs, gifts, raids, announcements) for
# normalization golden tests. The user login/display come from tags (the prefix is the
# server). Subs/gifts/raids show the system message; resubs and announcements show the
# user's own message (with emotes) when present.
